description.name: Villa Sol Dorado
description.headline: Exclusive Mallorcan villa with private pool and sea views
description.description: Nestled on the hillside above Port d'Andratx, Villa Sol Dorado is a stunning six-bedroom retreat that blends traditional Mallorcan architecture with modern luxury. Every room is bathed in natural light, and the expansive terrace offers uninterrupted views across the Mediterranean.

reviews: Absolutely breathtaking views and immaculate interiors. The pool was perfect and the kitchen had everything we needed. Will definitely return!
Best holiday we've ever had. The villa exceeded every expectation — spacious, clean, and the location is magical.
Outstanding property. The terrace at sunset is something you won't forget. Highly recommended for families or groups.

policies.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 30 days before check-in
policies.payment_schedule: 50% deposit on booking, remainder 30 days before arrival
policies.damage_deposit: €500 damage deposit, refunded within 7 days of departure
